mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_status ( student_course_id, status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{studentCourseId}, #{status}, false )
mapper.update: UPDATE application_status SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE application_status SET status = #{status}, is_deleted = false, deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = true
